hero.description: Upload, sign, and share legally binding documents with full audit trails. Built for teams that demand security and compliance.

features.title: Everything You Need to Sign
features.subtitle: A complete document signing platform built for security and simplicity.

items.title: Upload Documents
items.description: Drag and drop PDFs, Word docs, or images. Supports batch uploads for enterprise workflows.

items.title: Place Signatures
items.description: Draw, type, or upload your signature. Place it precisely where you need it on any page.

items.title: Share Signing Links
items.description: Send secure signing links to anyone. Track who has viewed and signed in real-time.

items.title: Download Signed PDFs
items.description: Generate tamper-proof signed PDFs with embedded digital certificates and timestamps.

items.title: Enterprise Security
items.description: End-to-end encryption, role-based access, and compliance with eIDAS and ESIGN regulations.

items.title: Full Audit Trail
items.description: Every action is logged with IP, timestamp, and user identity for complete traceability.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from document to signed agreement.

steps.title: Upload
steps.description: Upload your document in PDF, DOCX, or image format.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.description: Add signature fields and assign signers with roles.

steps.title: Send
steps.description: Share a secure link — signers get notified instantly.

steps.title: Sign & Download
steps.description: Signers complete the process; you get a certified PDF.

items.title: AES-256 Encryption
items.description: All documents encrypted at rest and in transit.

items.title: Tamper-Proof Certificates
items.description: Digital certificates embedded in every signed PDF.

items.title: SOC 2 Ready
items.description: Built with enterprise audit and compliance standards.

dashboard.title: Documents
dashboard.subtitle: Manage and track your signing workflows.

upload.title: Drop files here or click to upload
upload.subtitle: Supports PDF, DOCX, PNG, JPG (up to 25MB)
